string 2:
We're back again... What is even happening...
Were... we really able to change the past...?

Ugh! Feels like my head is going to explode... Well, first off,
let's go see Venusmon and see what's going on.

*sigh* Bless the stars! I feared the worst when you disappeared
so suddenly after your fight with Lanamon.

Given all that you have done for us these past eight
years... how can I possibly express my gratitude?
You don't owe us anything. After all...

That's right. After all, we still remember, just like it
was yesterday.

We said it to each other the first time we met, when you
were sheltering Divermon.
What do we need a reason to help someone for?
We're just doing the same thing as you.
So... where did Neptunemon go?
Back to the bottom of the ocean.

And, from what I hear, Neptunemon is keeping the Titans in
the vicinity in check—just as Neptunemon has always done.
Even if it means... continuing to defy orders from above.

And I hear the Current under Neptunemon's dominion will be
reopened as well.
Do you think he's gonna be okay?

I admit, I'm worried as well... But that is all the more reason
to support Neptunemon's wishes.
I want to put an end to the infighting between Digimon.
If only within the Abyss Area to start with...
That... Sounds amazing.

This village will be just fine. As such, let us turn our
attention to the matter you brought up.
Oh, that's right! We've gotta get back to Merukimon right away!
Merukimon... You said he's in the human world?
Could you take me to him?
Say, Aegiomon...
This is the second time we've traveled through time, huh?

The first time... was when you absorbed the power of the
treasure, back in Shinjuku eight years ago.
So I thought that maybe that's what causes the time travel...
Yeah... I was thinking the same thing...

...that it's Chronomon's power that I absorb from the
treasure that makes the time travel happen...

But what triggers the whole process...? I mean, what makes
the treasure activate...?
You know, now that I think about it...

...I thought I saw some kind of dark shadow just before we
time traveled...
I wonder if that has anything to do with it...
Yeah, I wonder...

If only I could use Chronomon's power whenever I wanted to,
of my own free will... then I'd be able to do anything!

He's right. I imagine he could pretty much make anything he
wanted happen.
A sort of "godlike power," if you will.

And if such a thing were actually possible... the very
precepts of our world would be turned on their head.

You'd better keep a very close watch over this Digimon
called Aegiomon...
I'm starting to get a bad feeling about all of this...
So where is this gate?

It's in the underground below Central Town. Come on. We'd
better hurry!

Regarding our previous discussion... ADAMAS has reached 
a consensus.

The ability to time travel that dwells within Aegiomon has
been ruled a new class-S anomaly.

"Class-S" is defined as "having an unstable state of equilibrium
that could bring disaster upon the world."

Am I making myself clear? It means we've deemed that Digimon 
to be a threat.

Don't you see how terrifying it would be if someone had the
ability to manipulate history like that?

Imagine, one minute a person could exist... The next,
poof! It's like they were never here to begin with.

I suggest you start considering worst-case scenarios here and now, 
while you still can...
I hope Merukimon is still doing all right.
Let's go.{next}
We should hurry!{next}
We'd better keep moving.{next}
...Sure took your sweet time, didn't you?
The situation's developing at a startling pace.
Merukimon passed out the second you all left.

The other Digimon have been like headless chickens with
their leader out of commission.

Hmm...I see. In that case, please take me to Merukimon's
location at once.
Merukimon's body... is being consumed by poison.

I'm guessing the substance entered Merukimon's system
from wounds inflicted in previous battles.
To be frank, I am afraid there is no hope at this point...
No! It can't be true!
I know the nature of this poison very well...

...because it's the same... as the poison Lanamon put into that
bottle of wine.
You mean that stuff loaded aboard MasterBlimpmon...?
Precisely. A foul concoction most likely created by the Titans...

I did a bit more research, and found another poison similar
in composition.
The same antidote may work on this one.
Wh-Where do we get this antidote?!
We need to compound it from the fruit of Karpos Hulē.

The fruit is precious and not readily available... but it can be 
harvested from the Gear Forest on rare occasions.

The Gear Forest... Over in the direction of the sanctuary,
right? The Current flows strong through the soil there.
Sounds like a perfect target for the Titans.
Let's go see what we can find!

After all... we promised Merukimon we'd get those villages
back from the Titans and stop the fighting.

Hopefully, it all can be resolved through negotiation. I can't
stand to see Digimon fighting each other anymore...
